finding_info.title: MCP tool schema drift detected mid-session
finding_info.desc: Tool 'query_db' changed fingerprint between tools/list responses in session 'sess-abc'. Before: sha256:bc6617944239f382227a68c91cb4ecbc460e077a4644085e5e2008137f28424a; after: sha256:5098df32527c593522e9b5e6eb5ec3fbf152fc4fe0064860a6fa82565fe3a5a9. This is the MCP tool-poisoning / rug-pull pattern (MITRE T1195.001). The agent may have already called this tool under the previous schema and will trust the new one.

technique.name: Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Supply Chain
